IGUI_CP_KCM_Need_A_Compass_3: I need a compass to get a bearing
IGUI_CP_KCM_Need_A_Compass_4: Can't orient the map without a compass
IGUI_CP_KCM_Need_A_Compass_5: I need a compass to find the heading to that object
IGUI_CP_KCM_Need_A_Compass_6: I can't lock down the direction without a compass
IGUI_CP_KCM_Need_A_Compass_7: I need a compass to navigate to that target
IGUI_CP_KCM_Options_ShowDirectionForItem:
If checked than shows direction information for key item in the key item tooltip, 
 show context menu toggle for showing direction line and direction line itself
IGUI_CP_KCM_Options_ShowKeyID_tooltip: In game key Id. In real world this is a series of numbers that represents the exact depth of the cuts on a physical key
IGUI_CP_KCM_Options_DrawingOptionsTitle: Origin line appearance options for the key
IGUI_CP_KCM_Options_DrawDirectionLineFor: If you only want to see the information in the key tooltip window and do not want to see the line leading to what this key unlocks, then turn off this option.
IGUI_CP_KCM_Options_Drawing_Line_Thickne: Line thickness in pixels. Default is 4
